title: Tender Grilled Australian Shrimp Skewers
description: A fresh and tender monsoon Australian dish featuring dark rum, perfect for a sugar-free friendly meal. This recipe combines the sweetness of pineapple with the richness of dark rum.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together dark rum, coconut milk, lime juice, garlic, and ginger.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated shrimp, pineapple chunks, and a sprinkle of salt and pepper onto the bamboo skewers.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Blanch the skewers in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
